title: ehrharta pusilla
intro: Ehrharta pusilla, also known as the small button grass, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Poaceae family. Traditionally, the plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Ehrharta pusilla include the treatment of wounds, skin conditions, and respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties for various health applications.
